note: PR A placeholder catalog — 3 work types. Phase 2.x PR-1: per-item scenarios/mitigations/ppe. v0.3.0: multi-language (en/vi/th/id) added. regulation 인용은 felix 검수 필요.

LIFTING.label_th: งานยก / ยกของหนัก

baseline.content: 리프팅 플랜 검토 — 중량물 무게·중심·줄걸이 방법 확인
baseline.content_en: Review lifting plan — verify load weight, center of gravity, and rigging method
baseline.content_vi: Xem xét kế hoạch nâng — xác nhận trọng lượng, trọng tâm và phương pháp móc cáp của vật nâng
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบแผนการยก — ยืนยันน้ำหนัก จุดศูนย์ถ่วง และวิธีการคล้องสลิงของวัสดุ
baseline.content_id: Tinjau rencana pengangkatan — verifikasi berat, titik pusat gravitasi, dan metode rigging beban

scenarios.content: 중심점 오판으로 양중 중 회전·기울어 인근 작업자 충돌
scenarios.content_en: Misjudged center of gravity causes the load to rotate/tilt during lifting, striking nearby workers
scenarios.content_vi: Đánh giá sai trọng tâm khiến vật nâng xoay/nghiêng trong khi nâng, va vào công nhân gần đó
scenarios.content_th: การประเมินจุดศูนย์ถ่วงผิดพลาด ทำให้วัสดุหมุน/เอียงระหว่างการยก และชนคนงานใกล้เคียง
scenarios.content_id: Kesalahan penilaian titik pusat gravitasi menyebabkan beban berputar/miring saat diangkat dan menabrak pekerja di sekitarnya

mitigations.content: 리프팅 플랜에 무게 중심 표시 + 시양중(test lift) 1회 시행
mitigations.content_en: Mark center of gravity on lifting plan and perform one trial/test lift before full lift
mitigations.content_vi: Đánh dấu trọng tâm trên kế hoạch nâng và thực hiện một lần nâng thử (test lift) trước khi nâng chính thức
mitigations.content_th: ทำเครื่องหมายจุดศูนย์ถ่วงในแผนการยก และทำการยกทดสอบ (test lift) 1 ครั้งก่อนยกจริง
mitigations.content_id: Tandai titik pusat gravitasi pada rencana pengangkatan dan lakukan satu kali test lift sebelum pengangkatan penuh

baseline.content: 크레인 정기점검 유효기간 및 SWL(safe working load) 확인
baseline.content_en: Verify crane periodic inspection validity and SWL (safe working load)
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra thời hạn kiểm định định kỳ của cẩu và SWL (tải trọng làm việc an toàn)
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบอายุการตรวจสอบประจำของเครน และค่า SWL (safe working load)
baseline.content_id: Verifikasi masa berlaku inspeksi berkala crane dan SWL (safe working load)

scenarios.content: 정격 초과 양중으로 크레인 전도 또는 와이어 절단
scenarios.content_en: Lifting beyond rated capacity causes crane to overturn or wire rope to snap
scenarios.content_vi: Nâng vượt tải định mức khiến cẩu lật đổ hoặc cáp thép đứt
scenarios.content_th: การยกเกินพิกัดทำให้เครนพลิกคว่ำหรือลวดสลิงขาด
scenarios.content_id: Pengangkatan melebihi kapasitas terukur menyebabkan crane terbalik atau wire rope putus

mitigations.content: 양중물 중량 사전 측정 + SWL 80% 이내 운용 원칙 준수
mitigations.content_en: Pre-weigh the load and operate within 80% of SWL as a working principle
mitigations.content_vi: Cân trọng lượng vật nâng trước và tuân thủ nguyên tắc vận hành trong phạm vi 80% SWL
mitigations.content_th: ชั่งน้ำหนักวัสดุล่วงหน้าและปฏิบัติตามหลักการทำงานในขอบเขต 80% ของ SWL
mitigations.content_id: Timbang beban terlebih dahulu dan operasikan dalam batas 80% SWL sebagai prinsip kerja

baseline.content: 줄걸이용구(슬링·체인·후크) 손상 점검 및 안전핀 결속
baseline.content_en: Inspect rigging gear (slings, chains, hooks) for damage and secure safety latches/pins
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra hư hỏng của thiết bị móc cáp (dây cáp, xích, móc) và cài chốt an toàn
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบความเสียหายของอุปกรณ์คล้อง (สลิง โซ่ ตะขอ) และล็อกสลักนิรภัย
baseline.content_id: Periksa kerusakan alat rigging (sling, rantai, hook) dan kunci safety latch/pin
baseline.regulation: 추정: KOSHA G-91, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 슬링 손상 미인지로 양중 중 절단 → 중량물 낙하
scenarios.content_en: Undetected sling damage causes failure during lift, resulting in load drop
scenarios.content_vi: Hư hỏng dây cáp không được phát hiện dẫn đến đứt trong khi nâng → vật nặng rơi
scenarios.content_th: ความเสียหายของสลิงที่ตรวจไม่พบทำให้ขาดระหว่างการยก → วัสดุหนักตก
scenarios.content_id: Kerusakan sling yang tidak terdeteksi menyebabkan putus saat pengangkatan → beban jatuh

mitigations.content: 교대 시작 시 슬링·후크 안전핀 시각 점검 + 색깔 라벨 갱신
mitigations.content_en: Visually inspect slings and hook safety pins at shift start and renew color-coded inspection tags
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra trực quan dây cáp và chốt an toàn móc khi bắt đầu ca, cập nhật nhãn màu kiểm định
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบสลิงและสลักนิรภัยตะขอด้วยสายตาเมื่อเริ่มกะ และอัปเดตป้ายสีตรวจสอบ
mitigations.content_id: Inspeksi visual sling dan safety pin hook saat awal shift dan perbarui label warna inspeksi

ppe.content_th: หมวกนิรภัย (รัดสายคาง)

baseline.content_en: Assign signal person and standardize signaling protocol (hand signals/radio)
baseline.content_vi: Bố trí người ra tín hiệu và thống nhất hệ thống tín hiệu (ra dấu tay/bộ đàm)
baseline.content_th: จัดเจ้าหน้าที่ให้สัญญาณ และกำหนดมาตรฐานระบบสัญญาณ (สัญญาณมือ/วิทยุสื่อสาร)
baseline.content_id: Tugaskan signalman dan standarisasi sistem sinyal (hand signal/radio)

scenarios.content: 신호 혼선 시 운전자가 잘못된 방향으로 양중 → 충돌
scenarios.content_en: Signal confusion causes the operator to lift in the wrong direction, resulting in collision
scenarios.content_vi: Tín hiệu nhiễu loạn khiến người vận hành nâng sai hướng → va chạm
scenarios.content_th: สัญญาณสับสนทำให้ผู้ปฏิบัติงานยกผิดทิศทาง → เกิดการชน
scenarios.content_id: Sinyal yang membingungkan menyebabkan operator mengangkat ke arah salah → terjadi tabrakan

mitigations.content: 전담 신호수 1명 지정 + 무전 채널 단일화
mitigations.content_en: Designate one dedicated signal person and use a single unified radio channel
mitigations.content_vi: Chỉ định 1 người ra tín hiệu chuyên trách và thống nhất một kênh bộ đàm duy nhất
mitigations.content_th: กำหนดเจ้าหน้าที่ให้สัญญาณเฉพาะ 1 คน และใช้ช่องวิทยุสื่อสารช่องเดียว
mitigations.content_id: Tetapkan satu signalman khusus dan gunakan satu channel radio terpadu

ppe.content_vi: Áo phản quang độ nhận diện cao
ppe.content_th: เสื้อกั๊กสะท้อนแสงทัศนวิสัยสูง

baseline.content: 양중 반경 내 출입금지 구역 설정·표시
baseline.content_en: Establish and mark a no-entry exclusion zone within the lifting radius
baseline.content_vi: Thiết lập và đánh dấu khu vực cấm vào trong bán kính nâng
baseline.content_th: กำหนดและทำเครื่องหมายเขตห้ามเข้าในรัศมีการยก
baseline.content_id: Tetapkan dan tandai zona terlarang dalam radius pengangkatan

scenarios.content: 출입금지 표시 미준수로 작업자 양중 반경 진입 → 추돌/추락
scenarios.content_en: Failure to observe no-entry markings allows a worker to enter the lifting radius, resulting in being struck or falling
scenarios.content_vi: Không tuân thủ biển cấm vào khiến công nhân tiến vào bán kính nâng → va chạm/rơi ngã
scenarios.content_th: การไม่ปฏิบัติตามป้ายห้ามเข้า ทำให้คนงานเข้าไปในรัศมีการยก → ถูกชนหรือตก
scenarios.content_id: Pengabaian tanda larangan masuk menyebabkan pekerja memasuki radius pengangkatan → tertabrak/terjatuh

mitigations.content: 라바콘 + 점멸 라이트 + 출입금지 게시 후 양중 시작
mitigations.content_en: Begin lifting only after placing traffic cones, flashing lights, and no-entry signage
mitigations.content_vi: Chỉ bắt đầu nâng sau khi đặt cọc tiêu, đèn nhấp nháy và biển cấm vào
mitigations.content_th: เริ่มยกหลังจากวางกรวยจราจร ไฟกระพริบ และป้ายห้ามเข้าแล้วเท่านั้น
mitigations.content_id: Mulai pengangkatan hanya setelah memasang traffic cone, lampu flashing, dan rambu larangan masuk

add.content: 풍속 15m/s 이상 — 양중작업 중단, 스톰핀 체결
add.content_en: Wind speed ≥ 15 m/s — suspend lifting operations and engage storm pins
add.content_vi: Tốc độ gió ≥ 15 m/s — ngừng công tác nâng và cài chốt chống bão (storm pin)
add.content_th: ความเร็วลม ≥ 15 m/s — หยุดงานยกและล็อกสลักกันพายุ (storm pin)
add.content_id: Kecepatan angin ≥ 15 m/s — hentikan pekerjaan pengangkatan dan pasang storm pin
add.regulation: 추정: KOSHA Heavy-Industry P-XX, felix 검수 필요

HOT_WORK.label_vi: Công tác sinh nhiệt / hàn cắt
HOT_WORK.label_th: งานที่ก่อให้เกิดประกายไฟ (Hot Work)

baseline.content: 화기작업 허가서 발급 및 유효시간 확인(8시간 단위)
baseline.content_en: Issue hot work permit (PTW) and verify validity period (8-hour basis)
baseline.content_vi: Cấp phiếu phép công tác sinh nhiệt (PTW) và kiểm tra thời hạn hiệu lực (theo đơn vị 8 giờ)
baseline.content_th: ออกใบอนุญาตงาน Hot Work (PTW) และตรวจสอบระยะเวลามีผล (หน่วยละ 8 ชั่วโมง)
baseline.content_id: Terbitkan Hot Work Permit (PTW) dan verifikasi masa berlaku (basis 8 jam)

scenarios.content: 허가 만료 후 추가 작업 강행 → 통제 외 화기 발생
scenarios.content_en: Continuing work after the permit expires leads to uncontrolled hot work activity
scenarios.content_vi: Tiếp tục công việc sau khi giấy phép hết hạn → phát sinh nguồn nhiệt ngoài kiểm soát
scenarios.content_th: ดำเนินงานต่อหลังใบอนุญาตหมดอายุ → เกิดประกายไฟนอกการควบคุม
scenarios.content_id: Melanjutkan pekerjaan setelah izin kedaluwarsa → terjadi aktivitas panas di luar kendali

mitigations.content: PTW 만료 30분 전 알람 + 연장 발급 절차 명문화
mitigations.content_en: Set an alarm 30 minutes before PTW expiry and document the extension/re-issue procedure
mitigations.content_vi: Thiết lập cảnh báo 30 phút trước khi PTW hết hạn và quy định hóa thủ tục gia hạn/cấp mới
mitigations.content_th: ตั้งการแจ้งเตือน 30 นาทีก่อน PTW หมดอายุ และจัดทำขั้นตอนต่ออายุเป็นเอกสาร
mitigations.content_id: Atur alarm 30 menit sebelum PTW kedaluwarsa dan dokumentasikan prosedur perpanjangan/penerbitan ulang

baseline.content: 용접·용단 시 차광판·불티 비산 방지포 설치
baseline.content_en: Install welding screens and fire-resistant spark/slag containment blankets during welding and cutting
baseline.content_vi: Lắp tấm chắn hồ quang và tấm chống bắn tia lửa khi hàn/cắt
baseline.content_th: ติดตั้งฉากกันแสงเชื่อมและผ้าทนไฟกันสะเก็ดไฟกระเด็นระหว่างงานเชื่อม/ตัด
baseline.content_id: Pasang welding screen dan fire blanket anti percikan saat pengelasan/pemotongan
baseline.regulation: 추정: KOSHA W-2, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 불티 비산으로 인근 가연물 발화 또는 통행자 화상
scenarios.content_en: Spark scattering ignites nearby combustibles or burns passing workers
scenarios.content_vi: Tia lửa bắn ra làm cháy vật liệu dễ cháy gần đó hoặc gây bỏng người qua lại
scenarios.content_th: สะเก็ดไฟกระเด็นทำให้วัสดุติดไฟใกล้เคียงลุกไหม้ หรือทำให้ผู้สัญจรผ่านถูกไฟไหม้
scenarios.content_id: Percikan api menyalakan bahan mudah terbakar di dekatnya atau membakar pekerja yang lewat

mitigations.content: 비산 반경 3m 차광판/불연포 2겹 + 통행자 우회 동선
mitigations.content_en: Install welding screens/fire blankets in 2 layers within a 3 m radius and divert pedestrian traffic
mitigations.content_vi: Lắp tấm chắn/tấm chống cháy 2 lớp trong bán kính 3 m và bố trí lối đi vòng cho người qua lại
mitigations.content_th: ติดตั้งฉากกัน/ผ้าทนไฟ 2 ชั้นในรัศมี 3 ม. และจัดเส้นทางเดินอ้อมสำหรับผู้สัญจร
mitigations.content_id: Pasang welding screen/fire blanket 2 lapis dalam radius 3 m dan alihkan jalur lalu lintas pejalan kaki

ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ hàn (cấp lọc sáng từ 9 trở lên)
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากเชื่อม (เกรดกรองแสงระดับ 9 ขึ้นไป)
ppe.content_id: Welding helmet (shade grade 9 atau lebih tinggi)

ppe.content_vi: Tạp dề da chuyên dụng cho thợ hàn
ppe.content_th: ผ้ากันเปื้อนหนังสำหรับงานเชื่อม

baseline.content: 용접흄 국소배기장치 가동 또는 송기마스크 착용
baseline.content_en: Operate local exhaust ventilation for welding fumes or wear supplied-air respirator
baseline.content_vi: Vận hành hệ thống hút cục bộ cho khói hàn hoặc đeo mặt nạ cấp khí
baseline.content_th: เดินระบบดูดอากาศเฉพาะจุดสำหรับฟูมเชื่อม หรือสวมหน้ากากจ่ายอากาศ
baseline.content_id: Operasikan local exhaust ventilation untuk welding fume atau pakai supplied-air respirator

scenarios.content: 용접흄 장기 노출로 작업자 호흡기·중금속 중독
scenarios.content_en: Long-term welding fume exposure causes respiratory disease and heavy-metal poisoning
scenarios.content_vi: Phơi nhiễm lâu dài với khói hàn gây bệnh đường hô hấp và ngộ độc kim loại nặng
scenarios.content_th: การสัมผัสฟูมเชื่อมระยะยาวทำให้คนงานเป็นโรคทางเดินหายใจและพิษโลหะหนัก
scenarios.content_id: Paparan welding fume jangka panjang menyebabkan penyakit pernapasan dan keracunan logam berat pada pekerja

mitigations.content: 국소배기 풍속 0.5m/s 이상 또는 송기마스크 의무 착용
mitigations.content_en: Maintain local exhaust face velocity ≥ 0.5 m/s or mandate supplied-air respirator use
mitigations.content_vi: Duy trì tốc độ hút cục bộ ≥ 0,5 m/s hoặc bắt buộc đeo mặt nạ cấp khí
mitigations.content_th: รักษาความเร็วลมดูดเฉพาะจุด ≥ 0.5 m/s หรือบังคับสวมหน้ากากจ่ายอากาศ
mitigations.content_id: Pertahankan kecepatan udara local exhaust ≥ 0,5 m/s atau wajibkan penggunaan supplied-air respirator

ppe.content_en: Supplied-air respirator or combined dust/gas respirator
ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ cấp khí hoặc khẩu trang lọc bụi/lọc hơi kết hợp
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากจ่ายอากาศ หรือหน้ากากกรองฝุ่น/แก๊สแบบรวม
ppe.content_id: Supplied-air respirator atau masker kombinasi anti-debu/anti-gas

baseline.content: 탱크·블록 내부 화기작업 시 가스농도(LEL) 측정
baseline.content_en: Measure gas concentration (LEL) when performing hot work inside tanks or blocks
baseline.content_vi: Đo nồng độ khí (LEL) khi thực hiện công tác sinh nhiệt bên trong bồn/khối kết cấu
baseline.content_th: วัดความเข้มข้นก๊าซ (LEL) เมื่อทำงาน Hot Work ภายในแท็งก์/บล็อก
baseline.content_id: Ukur konsentrasi gas (LEL) saat melakukan hot work di dalam tangki/blok

scenarios.content: 탱크 잔류 가연성 가스 미측정 상태에서 화기 점화 → 폭발
scenarios.content_en: Igniting hot work without measuring residual flammable gas in the tank leads to explosion
scenarios.content_vi: Mồi lửa khi chưa đo khí cháy còn dư trong bồn → nổ
scenarios.content_th: การจุดไฟทำงานโดยไม่วัดก๊าซติดไฟตกค้างในแท็งก์ → ระเบิด
scenarios.content_id: Menyalakan hot work tanpa mengukur sisa gas mudah terbakar di tangki → ledakan

mitigations.content: 작업 전·중 LEL 10% 미만 확인 (1시간 간격 재측정)
mitigations.content_en: Verify LEL is below 10% before and during work and remeasure every hour
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra LEL dưới 10% trước và trong khi làm việc, đo lại mỗi 1 giờ
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบ LEL ต่ำกว่า 10% ก่อนและระหว่างทำงาน และวัดซ้ำทุก 1 ชั่วโมง
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi LEL di bawah 10% sebelum dan selama pekerjaan, dan ukur ulang setiap 1 jam

baseline.content: 화재감시자 배치 및 작업 종료 후 1시간 잔불 점검(중공업 야드 강화)
baseline.content_en: Assign fire watch and conduct a 1-hour post-work residual ember inspection (heavy-industry yard standard)
baseline.content_vi: Bố trí người giám sát cháy (fire watch) và kiểm tra tàn lửa 1 giờ sau khi kết thúc công việc (tăng cường cho yard công nghiệp nặng)
baseline.content_th: จัดเจ้าหน้าที่เฝ้าระวังเพลิงไหม้ (fire watch) และตรวจสอบไฟค้างเป็นเวลา 1 ชั่วโมงหลังเสร็จงาน (มาตรฐานเข้มสำหรับยาร์ดอุตสาหกรรมหนัก)
baseline.content_id: Tugaskan fire watch dan lakukan inspeksi bara sisa selama 1 jam setelah pekerjaan selesai (standar diperkuat untuk yard industri berat)
baseline.regulation: 추정: KOSHA G-2, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 야드 환경에서 잔불이 강풍에 의해 인접 자재로 비산
scenarios.content_en: In an outdoor yard environment, residual embers are blown by strong wind to adjacent materials
scenarios.content_vi: Trong môi trường yard ngoài trời, tàn lửa bị gió mạnh thổi sang vật liệu lân cận
scenarios.content_th: ในสภาพแวดล้อมยาร์ดกลางแจ้ง ไฟค้างถูกลมแรงพัดไปยังวัสดุข้างเคียง
scenarios.content_id: Pada lingkungan yard terbuka, bara sisa terbawa angin kencang ke material di sekitarnya

mitigations.content: 전담 화재감시자 + 종료 후 1시간 잔불 순찰 + 살수 처리
mitigations.content_en: Dedicated fire watch plus 1-hour post-work patrol with water dousing of residual embers
mitigations.content_vi: Người giám sát cháy chuyên trách + tuần tra tàn lửa 1 giờ sau khi kết thúc + tưới nước dập lửa
mitigations.content_th: เจ้าหน้าที่เฝ้าระวังเพลิงไหม้เฉพาะ + ตรวจตราไฟค้าง 1 ชั่วโมงหลังเสร็จงาน + ราดน้ำดับ
mitigations.content_id: Fire watch khusus + patroli bara sisa 1 jam pasca-pekerjaan + penyiraman air

add.content: 탱크 내부 화기작업 — 산소(19.5~23.5%)·가연성가스(LEL 10% 미만) 동시 측정
add.content_en: Hot work inside tank — simultaneously measure oxygen (19.5–23.5%) and flammable gas (LEL < 10%)
add.content_vi: Công tác sinh nhiệt bên trong bồn — đo đồng thời oxy (19,5–23,5%) và khí cháy (LEL < 10%)
add.content_th: งาน Hot Work ภายในแท็งก์ — วัดออกซิเจน (19.5–23.5%) และก๊าซติดไฟ (LEL < 10%) พร้อมกัน
add.content_id: Hot work di dalam tangki — ukur oksigen (19,5–23,5%) dan gas mudah terbakar (LEL < 10%) secara simultan

CONFINED_SPACE.label_vi: Công tác trong không gian hạn chế
CONFINED_SPACE.label_th: งานในที่อับอากาศ (Confined Space)

baseline.content: 밀폐공간 작업허가서 발급 및 위험요인(질식/화재/유해가스) 명기
baseline.content_en: Issue confined space entry permit and explicitly list hazards (asphyxiation/fire/toxic gas)
baseline.content_vi: Cấp giấy phép vào không gian hạn chế và ghi rõ các yếu tố nguy hiểm (ngạt thở/cháy/khí độc)
baseline.content_th: ออกใบอนุญาตเข้าทำงานในที่อับอากาศและระบุปัจจัยอันตราย (ขาดอากาศ/ไฟไหม้/ก๊าซพิษ) อย่างชัดเจน
baseline.content_id: Terbitkan izin masuk ruang terbatas dan cantumkan secara eksplisit bahaya (asfiksia/kebakaran/gas beracun)

scenarios.content: 허가서 위험요인 누락으로 작업자가 잠재 가스 미인지 진입
scenarios.content_en: Omitted hazards on the permit cause workers to enter unaware of latent gas hazards
scenarios.content_vi: Bỏ sót yếu tố nguy hiểm trên giấy phép khiến công nhân vào trong khi không biết về khí tiềm ẩn
scenarios.content_th: การละเว้นปัจจัยอันตรายในใบอนุญาตทำให้คนงานเข้าไปโดยไม่รู้ตัวว่ามีก๊าซแฝง
scenarios.content_id: Bahaya yang terlewat dalam izin menyebabkan pekerja masuk tanpa menyadari adanya gas laten

mitigations.content: 위험요인 3종(질식/화재/유해가스) 별도 라인 명기 후 출력 게시
mitigations.content_en: List the three hazard categories (asphyxiation/fire/toxic gas) on separate lines and post the printed permit at the entry
mitigations.content_vi: Ghi 3 loại nguy hiểm (ngạt thở/cháy/khí độc) trên các dòng riêng biệt và niêm yết bản in tại lối vào
mitigations.content_th: ระบุปัจจัยอันตราย 3 ประเภท (ขาดอากาศ/ไฟไหม้/ก๊าซพิษ) แยกบรรทัด และติดประกาศแบบพิมพ์ที่ทางเข้า
mitigations.content_id: Cantumkan 3 jenis bahaya (asfiksia/kebakaran/gas beracun) di baris terpisah dan tempel izin cetak di pintu masuk

baseline.content_en: Measure oxygen (19.5–23.5%), flammable gas (LEL < 10%), and hydrogen sulfide (< 10 ppm)
baseline.content_vi: Đo oxy (19,5–23,5%), khí cháy (LEL < 10%) và hydro sulfua (< 10 ppm)
baseline.content_th: วัดออกซิเจน (19.5–23.5%), ก๊าซติดไฟ (LEL < 10%) และไฮโดรเจนซัลไฟด์ (< 10 ppm)
baseline.content_id: Ukur oksigen (19,5–23,5%), gas mudah terbakar (LEL < 10%), dan hidrogen sulfida (< 10 ppm)

scenarios.content: 산소 결핍 미감지 진입 → 질식 의식 상실
scenarios.content_en: Entering without detecting oxygen deficiency results in asphyxiation and loss of consciousness
scenarios.content_vi: Vào mà không phát hiện thiếu oxy → ngạt thở và mất ý thức
scenarios.content_th: เข้าไปโดยไม่ตรวจพบภาวะขาดออกซิเจน → ขาดอากาศหายใจและหมดสติ
scenarios.content_id: Memasuki ruang tanpa mendeteksi defisiensi oksigen → asfiksia dan hilang kesadaran

mitigations.content: 휴대용 4-가스 검지기로 진입 직전 + 1시간 간격 측정
mitigations.content_en: Use a portable 4-gas detector immediately before entry and re-measure every hour
mitigations.content_vi: Sử dụng máy đo 4 khí cầm tay ngay trước khi vào và đo lại mỗi 1 giờ
mitigations.content_th: ใช้เครื่องตรวจวัด 4 ก๊าซแบบพกพา ทันทีก่อนเข้าและวัดซ้ำทุก 1 ชั่วโมง
mitigations.content_id: Gunakan detektor 4-gas portabel tepat sebelum masuk dan ukur ulang setiap 1 jam

ppe.content_th: เครื่องตรวจวัด 4 ก๊าซแบบพกพา (O2/LEL/H2S/CO)

baseline.content: 송풍기 또는 강제환기 가동 및 작업 중 지속 환기
baseline.content_en: Operate a blower or forced ventilation and maintain ventilation continuously during work
baseline.content_vi: Vận hành quạt thổi hoặc thông gió cưỡng bức và duy trì thông gió liên tục trong khi làm việc
baseline.content_th: เดินพัดลมเป่าหรือระบบระบายอากาศแบบบังคับ และระบายอากาศต่อเนื่องตลอดการทำงาน
baseline.content_id: Operasikan blower atau ventilasi paksa dan pertahankan ventilasi terus-menerus selama pekerjaan

scenarios.content: 환기 중단 시 잔류 가스 농축으로 산소 결핍 재발생
scenarios.content_en: Stopping ventilation allows residual gas to accumulate and oxygen deficiency to recur
scenarios.content_vi: Khi ngừng thông gió, khí dư tích tụ và tái phát thiếu oxy
scenarios.content_th: เมื่อหยุดระบายอากาศ ก๊าซตกค้างจะสะสมและภาวะขาดออกซิเจนกลับมาเกิดอีก
scenarios.content_id: Menghentikan ventilasi memungkinkan gas sisa terakumulasi dan defisiensi oksigen muncul kembali

mitigations.content: 작업 종료 시까지 강제환기 지속 + 전원 차단 시 즉시 철수
mitigations.content_en: Maintain forced ventilation until work ends and evacuate immediately if power is lost
mitigations.content_vi: Duy trì thông gió cưỡng bức cho đến khi kết thúc công việc và rút lui ngay khi mất điện
mitigations.content_th: ระบายอากาศแบบบังคับต่อเนื่องจนเสร็จงาน และอพยพทันทีเมื่อไฟฟ้าดับ
mitigations.content_id: Pertahankan ventilasi paksa hingga pekerjaan selesai dan evakuasi segera bila listrik terputus

baseline.content_en: Assign an attendant (watcher) and ensure communication means (radio)
baseline.content_vi: Bố trí người giám sát (attendant) và đảm bảo phương tiện liên lạc (bộ đàm)
baseline.content_th: จัดเจ้าหน้าที่เฝ้าระวัง (attendant) และจัดเตรียมอุปกรณ์สื่อสาร (วิทยุสื่อสาร)
baseline.content_id: Tugaskan attendant (pengawas) dan pastikan sarana komunikasi (radio)

scenarios.content: 감시인 부재 또는 통신 두절로 비상 상황 대응 지연
scenarios.content_en: Absence of attendant or loss of communication delays emergency response
scenarios.content_vi: Vắng người giám sát hoặc mất liên lạc làm chậm phản ứng khẩn cấp
scenarios.content_th: การไม่มีเจ้าหน้าที่เฝ้าระวังหรือการสื่อสารขาดหายทำให้การตอบสนองเหตุฉุกเฉินล่าช้า
scenarios.content_id: Ketiadaan attendant atau putusnya komunikasi memperlambat respons darurat

mitigations.content: 감시인 1명 상주 + 5분 간격 호출 응답 절차
mitigations.content_en: Station one attendant permanently and follow a 5-minute interval call-and-response protocol
mitigations.content_vi: Bố trí 1 người giám sát thường trực và áp dụng thủ tục gọi-đáp 5 phút/lần
mitigations.content_th: ประจำเจ้าหน้าที่เฝ้าระวัง 1 คนตลอดเวลา และปฏิบัติตามขั้นตอนเรียก-ตอบทุก 5 นาที
mitigations.content_id: Tempatkan satu attendant secara permanen dan ikuti prosedur panggilan-respons setiap 5 menit

ppe.content_vi: Bộ đàm chống nước (kênh chuyên dụng)
ppe.content_th: วิทยุสื่อสารกันน้ำ (ช่องเฉพาะ)

baseline.content_en: Stage emergency rescue SCBA (self-contained breathing apparatus) and lifeline rope at entry
baseline.content_vi: Bố trí sẵn SCBA (bình thở khí nén) và dây cứu sinh tại lối vào cho cứu hộ khẩn cấp
baseline.content_th: จัดเตรียม SCBA (เครื่องช่วยหายใจแบบมีถังอากาศ) และเชือกช่วยชีวิตที่ทางเข้าสำหรับการกู้ภัยฉุกเฉิน
baseline.content_id: Siapkan SCBA (self-contained breathing apparatus) dan tali penyelamat di pintu masuk untuk rescue darurat

scenarios.content: 내부 작업자 의식 상실 시 구조자가 SCBA 없이 진입 → 2차 피해
scenarios.content_en: When an inside worker loses consciousness, rescuers entering without SCBA suffer secondary casualties
scenarios.content_vi: Khi công nhân bên trong mất ý thức, người cứu hộ vào không có SCBA → tổn thất thứ cấp
scenarios.content_th: เมื่อคนงานภายในหมดสติ ผู้กู้ภัยเข้าโดยไม่มี SCBA → เกิดผู้บาดเจ็บลำดับที่สอง
scenarios.content_id: Ketika pekerja di dalam kehilangan kesadaran, rescuer yang masuk tanpa SCBA mengalami korban sekunder

mitigations.content: SCBA 1조 + 구명로프 입구 비치 + 구조자 사전 SCBA 훈련
mitigations.content_en: One SCBA set plus lifeline staged at entry and pre-trained rescuers in SCBA use
mitigations.content_vi: 1 bộ SCBA + dây cứu sinh đặt sẵn tại lối vào + huấn luyện sử dụng SCBA cho người cứu hộ trước
mitigations.content_th: SCBA 1 ชุด + เชือกช่วยชีวิตวางที่ทางเข้า + ฝึกอบรมการใช้ SCBA ให้ผู้กู้ภัยล่วงหน้า
mitigations.content_id: Satu set SCBA + tali penyelamat ditempatkan di pintu masuk + pelatihan SCBA bagi rescuer sebelumnya

ppe.content_vi: SCBA (bình thở khí nén, đã nạp đầy)
ppe.content_th: SCBA (เครื่องช่วยหายใจ ชาร์จเต็ม)

add.content: 과거 질식·가스 사고 이력 — 진입 전 산소·황화수소·일산화탄소 3종 동시 측정 + 환기 30분 이상 선행
add.content_en: Prior asphyxiation/gas incident history — before entry, simultaneously measure oxygen, hydrogen sulfide, and carbon monoxide, and pre-ventilate for at least 30 minutes
add.content_vi: Tiền sử sự cố ngạt thở/khí — trước khi vào, đo đồng thời oxy, hydro sulfua và carbon monoxide, đồng thời thông gió trước ít nhất 30 phút
add.content_th: มีประวัติเหตุการณ์ขาดอากาศ/ก๊าซในอดีต — ก่อนเข้า ให้วัดออกซิเจน ไฮโดรเจนซัลไฟด์ และคาร์บอนมอนอกไซด์พร้อมกัน และระบายอากาศล่วงหน้าอย่างน้อย 30 นาที
add.content_id: Riwayat insiden asfiksia/gas sebelumnya — sebelum masuk, ukur oksigen, hidrogen sulfida, dan karbon monoksida secara simultan, serta ventilasi awal minimal 30 menit

conditional.if: shift == night OR special_notes contains 단독 작업

add.content: 야간·단독 작업 시 — 외부 감시인 2인 배치 + 무전 채널 상시 개방 + 30분 단위 안부 콜
add.content_en: For night or solo work — assign two external attendants, keep the radio channel open at all times, and perform welfare check-in calls every 30 minutes
add.content_vi: Với ca đêm hoặc làm việc một mình — bố trí 2 người giám sát bên ngoài, mở kênh bộ đàm thường trực và gọi kiểm tra an toàn mỗi 30 phút
add.content_th: สำหรับงานกลางคืนหรือทำงานคนเดียว — จัดเจ้าหน้าที่เฝ้าระวังภายนอก 2 คน เปิดช่องวิทยุสื่อสารตลอดเวลา และโทรเช็คความปลอดภัยทุก 30 นาที
add.content_id: Untuk shift malam atau pekerjaan solo — tugaskan 2 attendant eksternal, jaga channel radio tetap terbuka, dan lakukan welfare call setiap 30 menit
